answers: SMART goals: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound. 'Lose 5kg in 3 months' not 'get fit'.
Tips: write goals down (increases success by 42%), break into milestones, track progress, and celebrate wins.
Goal categories: health, career, financial, relationship, personal growth. Set 1-3 goals per area max.
Lokkhyo thik kora: SMART method use koro, likhe rakhho, progress track koro, ar chhoto wins celebrate koro.
